name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238/A238 (petrol, incl. AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: Mfr row: W213 petrol models follow Mercedes EU fixed and ASSYST schedules with engine oil and filter typically 15,000 km or 12 months on common European plans (KBB/operator summaries for current E-Class). Rec row: 10,000 km for severe driving.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Engine air filter at ASSYST inspection intervals (60,000 km / 48 months typical on EU documentation).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month brake fluid renewal for W213 across petrol and diesel lines per Mercedes-Benz European guidance cited in independent maintenance references.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect pads each service; 30,000 km mid-cycle reminder.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Spark plug renewal for M264/M256-type petrol engines at extended mileage and time limits (60,000 km / 48 months typical EU orientation—AMG M177 may differ; verify ASSYST for E 63).
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant exchange per Mercedes maintenance data (often near 150,000 km).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 9G-TRONIC preventive ATF service near 60,000 km despite lifetime claims.
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC and AMG Performance 4MATIC+ models only. Preventive fluid near 60,000 km when no fixed OEM interval.
serviceNotes.rear axle differential oil: Preventive axle oil for AWD variants.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory belt near 100,000 km on applicable engines.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection petrol engines may need intake valve cleaning around 120,000 km if carbon-related symptoms occur.
